applicant_info.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.

additional_remarks.remark: 1. WC 00 03 13 - Alternate Employer Endorsement; 2. WC 00 03 11 - Waiver of Our Right to Recover From Others Endorsement; 3. IL 09 85 01 15 - Disclosure Pursuant to Terrorism Risk Insurance Act; 4. Employment-related Practices Exclusion.
Included as additional insured per written contract, agreement, or permit as respects General Liability.
Waiver of subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder, as required by written contract.

LOC-001: 604 Brazos Street, Austin, TX 78701 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-002: Hampton Inn & Suites San Marcos - 106 Interstate 35 North, San Marcos, TX 78666 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-003: Fredericksburg Inn & Spa - 201 South Main Street, Fredericksburg, TX 78624 (Occupancy: Hotel); LOC-004: South Congress Hotel - 1603 South Congress Avenue, Austin, TX 78704 (Occupancy: Hotel).
The insured's principal operations consist of boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Entity type: LLC.

remarks: Endorsement schedule includes Alternate Employer, Waiver of Recovery From Others, TRIA disclosure, and Employment-related Practices Exclusion. Additional insured applies per written contract for General Liability. Waiver of subrogation applies in favor of the certificate holder. Locations listed include Austin, San Marcos, Fredericksburg, and South Congress hotel properties. Nature of operations is boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas.
